## Plugin Checklist (if adding/modifying a plugin)

- [ ] `.claude-plugin/plugin.json` present with name, description, author
- [ ] `README.md` with setup instructions
- [ ] Valid YAML frontmatter on all commands, agents, and skills
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets or credentials
- [ ] Plugin registered in `.claude-plugin/marketplace.json`
- [ ] Tested locally with `claude --plugin-dir`

## Validation

- [ ] `bun .github/scripts/validate-frontmatter.ts` passes
